title: After the Shuka Sho: Witch's Dignity

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho claims a spectacular victory at the
Shuka Sho. I feel that her performance has even
changed the way the spectators see her now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To complete her racing magic, Sweep Tosho
needs two more things—a special rival, and to
actually be special herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being the Triple Tiara tour representative alone
isn't enough. She needs to become even more
special.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She decides that her next race will be the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup, where she can run against
senior-year Umamusume on the Triple Tiara tour.
